attributes.action: Offer Oil heating users the same Energy Cap protections (without means testing)
attributes.additional_details: Huge unaffordable costs as a result of current conflict price rises.
attributes.background: Homes using Oil fired heating should have the same Energy Cap protections as Gas/Electic users

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Regulate companies supplying heating oil and LPG" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764213
